overall.description: A cinematic nighttime view of a futuristic cyberpunk city plaza from Cyberpunk 2077. The camera slowly pans across a circular pedestrian plaza surrounded by towering glass skyscrapers adorned with massive neon holographic advertisements featuring a glowing red koi fish and blue jellyfish swimming through the night sky above.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban plaza with holographic advertisements

events.description: holographic red koi begins swimming from left toward center of sky
blue jellyfish hologram starts moving leftward from right side, approaching the koi

agents.ego_description: stationary elevated camera slowly panning left to observe the plaza and holographic display

notable_agents.action: futuristic car with blue neon underglow driving along the plaza perimeter

entered.detail: massive glowing orange-red koi fish hologram swimming in the night sky
large translucent blue jellyfish hologram with trailing tentacles
multi-level circular pedestrian plaza with ramps and walkways
tall building covered in bright neon advertisements and signage including 'BRITE' text
towering futuristic glass and steel buildings with illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a futuristic cyberpunk plaza at night, dominated by two massive holographic creatures - a red koi fish on the left and a blue jellyfish on the right - swimming through the sky above a circular pedestrian structure. The camera slowly pans left, revealing neon-soaked skyscrapers surrounding the open plaza while sparse pedestrians and occasional neon-lit vehicles move through the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban plaza with holographic advertisements

events.description: holographic red koi and blue jellyfish cross paths in the center of the sky
camera continues panning left, revealing the opposite side of the plaza with new building facades

agents.ego_description: continuing to pan left, maintaining focus on the crossing holographic displays above the plaza

entered.detail: raised pedestrian bridge crossing over the lower plaza level

segments.scene_description: As the camera continues its leftward pan, the two massive holograms cross paths in the center of the sky, with the red koi moving to the right side and the blue jellyfish to the left. The perspective shifts to show the opposite side of the circular plaza, revealing elevated walkways and different angles of the surrounding glass towers while maintaining the neon-drenched cyberpunk atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban plaza with holographic advertisements

events.description: holographic creatures complete their arc and begin returning to original positions
camera approaches original starting position as pan completes full rotation

agents.ego_description: completing the panoramic observation of the plaza as the holographic display cycles back to its starting formation

notable_agents.action: futuristic vehicle with red taillights driving along the right perimeter road

entered.detail: futuristic curved street lamps with blue and red accent lighting

segments.scene_description: In the final segment, the camera completes its panoramic sweep as the holographic red koi and blue jellyfish swim back toward their original positions on the left and right respectively. The view returns to the initial perspective showing the neon building facades and the circular plaza below, with the continuous flow of sparse pedestrian and vehicle traffic maintaining the living city atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous leftward pan across a futuristic cyberpunk plaza, shifting the perspective of the neon-drenched skyline and the celestial holograms above. It begins with a view of a circular pedestrian structure dominated by a red koi fish and a blue jellyfish swimming through the night sky. As the camera glides left, the surrounding glass skyscrapers and sparse neon-lit vehicles come into view, creating a sense of immense urban scale. The scene then shifts as the two massive holograms cross paths in the center of the sky, swapping positions while the camera reveals elevated walkways on the opposite side of the plaza. Finally, the movement settles on a new angle of the towering architecture, maintaining the vibrant, glowing atmosphere of the city.

The shot follows a continuous panoramic sweep that returns the viewer to the initial perspective of a neon-drenched futuristic plaza. It begins with the camera completing its wide arc as the holographic red koi and blue jellyfish glide back toward their original positions on the left and right. As the movement settles, the view shifts back to the towering neon building facades that frame the circular pedestrian space below. The scene finally stabilizes on the living city atmosphere, where the steady flow of sparse pedestrian and vehicle traffic continues beneath the glowing advertisements.
